_comment: Hand-edited top-level metadata for patterns.json. Bumped per the Versioning protocol when a release ships. The patterns.json output file is regenerated from this + the .md files in components/ by website/scripts/generate-patterns-json.js (runs in prebuild).
_comment_order_overrides: Patterns default to alphabetical filename order (which also drives the sidebar). Each [earlierId, laterId] pair pins earlierId to appear immediately before laterId. select.native ("Select (Basic)") must precede select.basic ("Select (Custom Style)"), the reverse of the alphabetical select.basic/select.native. Unlisted patterns keep their alphabetical slot.
